{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323025941BC7548442B36509325F3"}"},"total":761},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7320470023679132452","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉还是第一次接触这种类型的文(maybe?)不过像赫sir这样子的律师男主我还是第一次见，只能说大大的男主角设定真的很吸引人，让我一打开文章后就看到停不下来，而且男主挺长嘴，即使女主闹别扭不分是非(谈恋爱的女孩子嘛)臭骂男主，男主都不会因为强大的主角光环而一气之下离女主远去，反而就事论事，能够迁就、理解并且耐心解释(说实话是真的很情绪稳定的灵魂伴侣对象[爱慕][爱慕])
当然女主也不是一贯的小白花or女强人，面对现实有坚持也会适当屈服，不是蛮干的形象。
当女主去找男主希望他能替她翻案时，其实最初面对男主拒绝帮助女主选择稳妥自身事业的时候，我是不能接受的(或许这也是小说看多了形成的隐性认识:以为男主就是足够强大，对于女主的事都能“深情or坚定”的表示支持or帮助)但素现在我也能理解了，为自己事业长远的着想是很现实的(but拒绝那些影响不良的打算)，也是一个对自己负责任的态度，因此男主的形象更是上大分了🤗
总而言之，这本书可以冲，大家可别犹豫啦！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1704430827,"group_id":"7304821424147926043","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N25dqzSMmFbij+1SHX0xuPo=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/50513869e447415bbec740a7ccabdd78~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788854&x-signature=7P%2BT1sTkaAyeYcKFUzFjV%2FmRbrM%3D","user_id":"770085258534360","user_name":"格仙岛的鲁力文鲁"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"770085258534360","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7304821424147926043","book_info":{"abstract":"苏茗薇因为一场官司，撩拨了律政界的活阎王赫泓峥。
从此，忙的一发不可收拾。
这边忙着平案子，那边忙着撩律师。
十八般武艺，三十六计，能用的招数全都安排。技多不压身，咱主打艺高人胆大。
当禁欲律师化身雅痞坏坏男人之后，苏茗薇直呼扛不住。
他宠她入骨。为她跌落神坛。
正在她心存愧疚之际，才发现，他哪里是跌落神坛？他只是换了个神坛。
从此，她的KPI他全包，看上哪个自己挑。
当她身娇甜软的靠在他怀里，叫着“赫律师”的时候。
他眼镜轻抬，知道她又闯祸了。
“人都说，老婆闹得越凶，说明老公本事越大。”
他了然的点了点头，闯的祸还不小……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/197cba4e6c7077c6143df364b0e42a93","author":"奶油酥饼可可","author_id":"","book_id":"7304821424147926043","book_name":"禁欲律师蓄谋已久，娇娇无处可逃","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":750,"name":"职场婚恋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=750&name=职场婚恋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":30,"name":"宠妻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=30&name=宠妻&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":127,"name":"职场","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=127&name=职场&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":488,"name":"律师","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=488&name=律师&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7304821566829756965","read_count":"16708","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"598246"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"288","tags":"职场婚恋,现代言情,宠妻,甜宠,职场,律师","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e289c7a63b7bcdd3df6f76bf94947f0d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779389981&x-signature=fuxF9BXBw%2FXYi6TA3e7nW414VGg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2958166966935928","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"158"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323025941BC7548442B36509325F3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":55,"forwarded_count":0,"lis
